modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: For denominator magnitudes at least `min_sigdenom`, use `V(sigdenom)` directly in the divider transfer.
For positive denominator magnitudes below `min_sigdenom`, use `+min_sigdenom` as the guarded denominator.
For exactly zero denominator, use `+min_sigdenom` as the guarded denominator.
For negative denominator magnitudes below `min_sigdenom`, use `-min_sigdenom` as the guarded denominator.
Drive `sigout` to the observable transfer `gain * V(signumer) / guarded_denominator`.

title: Safe Analog Divider
